full_text:
Liu Hong (Shuhe) 劉弘 (叔和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Hong (劉弘), styledShuhe (叔和). Son of Liu Jing, grandson of Liu Fu. Liu Hong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
